title: Telnyx ticket #3 — opt-in consent form screenshot demand
html:
Third telnyx toll-free verification rejection (Oct 30) — same CTIA boilerplate ("submit screenshot of opt-in consent form... use case sms type, data rates, frequency, STOP, HELP, Privacy policy"). Business name Vrtl Pirates, DBA "Outpace - iMessage Step Counter," still Waiting For Customer.

telnyx · vrtl pirates · outpace · ctia compliance · toll free verification · infra blockers
